scores.correctness_notes: All events from the gold standard are present and accurately described. Includes lifecycle, leadership, relation, storage, secret, pebble/container, and series upgrade hooks. Also correctly notes deprecation context implicitly by including series upgrade hooks.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — all listed events match the gold standard. The response omits ops class names (e.g. InstallEvent, CollectStatusEvent) and misses collect_app_status/collect_unit_status, but does not invent anything.
